infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Connect to the Moxxy runner on your computer over your local Wi-Fi network.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Moxxy Mobile Gateway to access your microphone for voice input.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Moxxy Mobile Gateway to scan the pairing QR code from your Mac.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Moxxy Mobile Gateway to attach screenshots and photos to your Moxxy messages.
